summary: The user sought recommendations for eco-friendly sunscreens for an upcoming beach trip and expressed interest in Goddess Garden Organics products. They inquired about the availability of a refillable container for the Goddess Garden Organics Everyday Natural Sunscreen and explored other eco-friendly products, including a moisturizer and facial serum, while also asking about the brand's sustainable packaging practices and refill program.
facts: The user is looking for a new eco-friendly sunscreen for an upcoming beach trip. The user is interested in the Goddess Garden Organics Everyday Natural Sunscreen. Goddess Garden Organics offers a refill option for their Everyday Natural Sunscreen through a "Refill Pouch" program. The refill pouch for Goddess Garden Organics' sunscreen is made of recyclable materials and is designed to be reused. Goddess Garden Organics' Everyday Natural Moisturizer features a blend of organic herbs, including aloe vera, chamomile, and green tea. Goddess Garden Organics' Facial Serum is recommended for mature, dry, sensitive, and combination skin types. Goddess Garden Organics' packaging includes recyclable tubes made from HDPE #2 and uses post-consumer recycled materials whenever possible. Goddess Garden Organics' refill program for sunscreens can reduce waste by up to 70% compared to traditional packaging. Goddess Garden Organics aims to make all their packaging recyclable, reusable, or biodegradable by 2025. The user has been making a conscious effort to switch to eco-friendly products in their daily life.
